description: Workflow hooks for Codex. SessionStart writes a session-scoped workflow env export file, using transcript metadata for workflow-operator subagents, and injects provider-backed workflow authoring policy only for main sessions when .workflow/config.yml exists in the active project. UserPromptSubmit reads mentioned and pending GitHub issue references through cache-aware provider reads and injects project-relative issue cache paths as additionalContext. Stop records session-mentioned issues as pending without provider reads or JSON output. Codex has no built-in Read tool and no reliable read-tracking surface, so the Claude-side authoring read ledger and PreToolUse write guard are intentionally not wired here.

hooks.description: Inject workflow authoring resolver policy for configured workflow projects in main sessions
Cache mentioned GitHub issue references and inject project-relative issue cache paths as additionalContext
Record session-mentioned GitHub issues as pending without provider reads or Stop JSON output
